summary: Gated daily supervision lane failures on their scheduled windows so pre-08:45/09:55/16:30 runs no longer open false urgent Hermes incidents for 2026-06-14.
Made audit:skills refresh the home .skill-store mirror before the read-only check so Hermes no longer flags stale lane-owner skill copies.
issues: Daily supervision flagged .skill-store drift for three lane-owner skills after repo skill updates.
reusable_rules: Post-skill-edit audits must sync the installed mirror before using read-only governance checks.
